commands.review_summary:
The PR adds room-scoped OpenClaw crabbox supervision routes, a dedicated MultiCodex service token, service branch preparation, session-tree retention and capacity handling, docs, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR review concerns by source inspection: current main accepts root-only create requests in resolveInteractiveSessionLineage, while PR head rejects them before creation, and the release-owned changelog edit is present in the diff. I did not run a live service path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This draft member-authored feature has privileged service-token and compatibility decisions, so it needs maintainer/security review rather than an autonomous repair PR.

target.title: feat(api): add room-scoped crabbox supervision
target.body:
## Summary

- add root-fenced OpenClaw service reads for Crabbox room trees
- add bounded transcript evidence, targeted PTY nudges, audited stop, and canonical browser URLs
- supervise service-created sessions plus their agent-created descendants with bounded fan-out
- retain supervised roots while any descendant remains active
- reserve room capacity before GitHub branch preparation and document the MultiCodex supervision contract

## Validation

- `pnpm test` (191 passed)
- `pnpm exec tsgo --noEmit`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/index.ts src/openclaw-service.ts tests/openclaw-service.test.ts tests/runtime-adapter.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/openclaw-service.ts tests/openclaw-service.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

`pnpm check` passes asset generation, typecheck, and lint, then reaches the repo-wide formatter gate, which is currently red on 72 baseline files with the installed formatter; no unrelated formatter churn is included here.
target.author: vincentkoc
